message:
refactor(mvcc,ast): adapt index_regen and rebase to Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> SqliteValue

- index_regen.rs: sqlite_concat returns Arc-backed Text/Blob,
  eval_function lower/upper/typeof adapted, apply_collation for
  NOCASE/RTRIM uses Arc::from() instead of to_owned()
- rebase.rs: literal_to_rebase converts String/Blob literals via
  Arc::from(s.as_str()) and Arc::from(b.as_slice())

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
